responsibilities: Translate ambiguous business problems into well-defined machine learning formulations and measurable success metrics
Design, build, and deploy machine learning models that directly improve key product and business metrics
Run rigorous A/B tests and causal analyses to quantify the real-world impact of deployed models
Collaborate closely with engineering teams to productionize models within existing platform infrastructure
Analyze large-scale datasets to uncover actionable insights that inform product and strategic decisions
Develop and refine algorithms for recommendation, ranking, forecasting, or personalization at scale
Communicate complex modeling results and trade-offs clearly to non-technical stakeholders and leadership
Iterate on model performance using offline evaluation and online experimentation to drive continuous improvement
Partner with data engineering teams to ensure high-quality, reliable data pipelines feed model training
Document methodologies and findings to support reproducibility and knowledge sharing across teams
